patch.value:
## Context
2026-07-06 audit #7 verified two open dogfood GH issues against pm 2026.7.5 in this workspace and both report already-shipped features:
- GH-436 "Port the MCP-only pm next and pm focus tools to the CLI" — `pm next` (PR#357, src/core/item/actionability.ts) and `pm focus` (PR#257) are first-class CLI commands and work live.
- GH-440 "Add --fields projection to pm context" — `pm context --fields id,title` works live (shipped PR#297).

## Action
Close both GH issues with a comment citing the shipping PRs and the verified version (2026.7.5); if the reporter hit an older global install, note the upgrade path. No code change needed unless re-verification finds an edge (e.g. focus-as-default-parent parity claimed by GH-436 — spot-check `pm create` honors focused item as default parent before closing).

## Definition of done
GH-436 + GH-440 closed with evidence comments; focus->default-parent parity spot-checked; this chore closed with resolution fields.
Triage: close stale dogfood reports GH-436 (pm next/focus) and GH-440 (context --fields) with shipped evidence

Audit #7 verified pm next, pm focus, and pm context --fields all work on 2026.7.5, so GH-436/GH-440 report already-shipped features. Duplicate check: no item references these issue numbers (storage grep 2026-07-06).
GH-436 and GH-440 closed on GitHub with comments citing PR#357/PR#257/PR#297 and live verification on 2026.7.5; focus->default-parent parity spot-checked first
